name: MindCore AI

trial.description: Try it with 50 messages and 5 minutes of voice — no credit card, no commitment.

platform: Android — available now on Google Play. iOS coming soon.
target_audience: Men 35 and over dealing with anxiety, depression, isolation, or in recovery
cta: Download MindCore AI on Google Play
important_notes: There is NO free plan — only a limited trial of 50 messages and 5 voice minutes over 30 days
Never say 'start free' — say 'try it' or 'start your trial'
Never invent features that are not listed above
Never mention iOS availability as current — it is coming soon only
